onboarding_subtitle: Let's set up your membership vault. This takes about 2 minutes.
onboarding_select_heading: Which memberships and programs do you hold?
onboarding_select_subheading: Select any that apply. You can always add more later.
onboarding_error: Could not load the membership catalog. Please try again.
onboarding_empty_search: No programs match "{query}". Try a different search.
onboarding_finish_body: Your memberships are saved. TrueRate will now surface the perks and discounts that apply to you.
onboarding_finish_empty: Your vault is empty - add a membership any time from your dashboard.
onboarding_resume_banner: You haven't finished setting up your vault.
